nodes.label: Updater Tests
nodes.rationale: Covers: get_xpst_version pinned 0.1.0, get_installed_version for present/missing packages, _version_is_newer comparisons including None, PackageInfo defaults, UpdateComponent to_dict shape, _annotate_component status/action/update_command for missing and updatable pip packages, bundled provider metadata status, and check_update_components offline shape (app/packages/helpers/provider_metadata).
